questions.question: Does README.md correctly list Codex in the Frameworks & Tools table with accurate description and requirements?
questions.actionable_check: Read README.md lines 77-84 and verify Codex entry exists with description 'AI-assisted development CLI (OpenAI)' and requires 'Node.js'
evidence_required: README.md content showing Codex table row
Verification that description matches other frameworks' format
Verification that Node.js requirement is listed
questions.pass_criteria: Codex appears in table with correct description and Node.js requirement

questions.question: Does CHANGELOG.md contain an entry for Codex under [Unreleased] / Added section?
questions.actionable_check: Read CHANGELOG.md and verify Codex entry exists under [Unreleased] / Added with installation method and framework details
evidence_required: Verification entry includes npm installation method
Verification entry mentions it's a default framework
questions.pass_criteria: CHANGELOG.md has Codex entry under [Unreleased] / Added describing the feature accurately

questions.question: Does specs/spec.md consistently reference codex in all relevant framework lists?
questions.actionable_check: Search specs/spec.md for framework lists and verify codex appears consistently alongside claude-code
evidence_required: All framework list occurrences in spec.md
Verification codex appears in Auto-Bundled Frameworks section
Verification codex appears in example configurations
questions.pass_criteria: All framework references in spec.md include codex where appropriate

questions.question: Is the documentation consistent with the implementation in treating codex as a non-configurable default?
questions.actionable_check: Compare documentation descriptions with wizard.py and provisioner.py to ensure codex is documented as always-included like claude-code
evidence_required: Documentation stating codex is a default framework
Code showing codex added to static defaults
No user configuration required for codex
questions.pass_criteria: Documentation accurately reflects codex as a non-configurable default framework

questions.question: Are all user-facing documents updated to reflect the codex addition?
questions.actionable_check: Verify README.md, CHANGELOG.md, and specs/spec.md all mention codex appropriately
questions.pass_criteria: All three documentation files contain accurate codex information
